title: Preliminary Detection IUe8190 Logged For Follow-Up
summary: A preliminary asteroid candidate identified during team review has been recorded internally for verification and historical tracking in the Kenya asteroid dispatch archive.
content:
A preliminary moving-object candidate labelled IUe8190 was logged during post-campaign review and entered into the internal dispatch record for follow-up reference. At this stage, the record is not a public claim of a confirmed asteroid discovery. It is a documentation step in the research process.

The purpose of including entries like this in Dispatch is historical clarity. Kenya asteroid work deserves an archive that distinguishes between preliminary detections, validated reports, and confirmed outcomes. This prevents confusion while preserving the scientific path that led to each result.

As additional verification progresses, this entry can be expanded or linked to later research notes, making Dispatch a durable observatory memory rather than a stream of isolated announcements.
